name: io.github.mohanagy/madar
description: Task-aware local context packs for TypeScript/Node AI coding workflows.
title: Madar

environmentVariables.name: MADAR_TOOL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Optional MCP tool surface: core graph-navigation tools, strict bounded context_pack/context_expand tools, or full.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notes: Public npm package plus local auto-refresh MCP flow. When an MCP host launches `madar serve --stdio --auto-refresh` with a workspace as its cwd, Madar builds and refreshes that workspace's local graph without a static graph-path argument. Madar is the renamed continuation of `graphify-ts`; use `@lubab/madar` and `https://github.com/mohanagy/madar` as the canonical package and repository.
